title: Mount Pleasant road safety survey | Chris Bloore MP
text_excerpt: --> Mount Pleasant road safety survey | Chris Bloore MP top of page Road safety in Mount Pleasant During a recent public meeting, residents in your area raised concerns about the road safety on Mount Pleasant and the surrounding streets. ​ I’ve heard about issues regarding dangerous pavement parking, pushing pedestrians into the road, along with speeding, causing a hazardous situation for all pedestrians and particularly putting children at risk. I want Worcestershire County Council and the police to take action to make sure you feel safe using the streets in your neighbourhood. ​ Residents have suggested different ways to address these challenges, and I want to hear from you . I’ve put together a short survey to hear about your experiences in this area, and what you think could help. ​ Tell me about your road safety concerns First name * Last name * Email * Address * Postcode * Tell me about your road safety concerns in Mount Pleasant What do you think would help solve these issues? Yes, subscribe me to your newsletter. By ticking this box, I consent to the office of Chris Bloore MP contacting me via the details about ( https://www.chrisbloore.co.uk/privacy-policy ) * Submit Home Advice Surgeries Latest News About Chris Raise a local issue Redditch Directory Campaigns Post delivery problems Police front desk Pride in Place Mount Pleasant road safety survey SEND reforms Health & Social Care Allergy safety Past Campaigns More Use tab to navigate through the menu items.
